caption: A person's hands are shown opening a white box of sports cards on a table. In the first frame, the person holds a small black object. By the second frame, the hands are gripping the edges of a large white box with blue text. In the third and fourth frames, the person uses a small cutting tool to slice through the packing tape on top of the box. Several other boxes are stacked in the background, some featuring the words "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC." A red cup sits on the table. Throughout the video, small inset windows show a person wearing a black shirt and a baseball cap. On-screen overlays include the "JASPYS" logo with the website "CASEBREAKS.com" and the large text "CASEBREAKS" across the bottom of the screen.
